A cubical box with sides of length 7 has vertices at (0, 0, 0), (7, 0, 0), (0,
7, 0), (7, 7, 0), (0, 0, 7), (7, 0, 7), (0, 7, 7), (7, 7, 7). The inside of
the box is lined with mirrors and from the point (0, 1, 2), a beam of light
is directed to the point (1, 3, 4). The light then reflects repeatedly off
the mirrors on the inside of the box. Determine how far the beam of light
travels before it first returns to its starting point at (0, 1, 2).
